events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: shackle side-loaded during rigging configuration, in-progress. Side-loading a shackle is a serious violation of ASME B30 and OSHA 1926.251. Shackles are designed for in-line loading; side loading reduces WLL significantly and can cause failure. Decision: fail. Risk: high/critical. Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective. Immediate controls: stop the lift, reconfigure rigging so load is in-line with shackle pin, use appropriate shackle/spreader, ensure proper D/d ratio, inspect shackle for deformation, replace if deformed.
